channel.title: Gareth Murphy
channel.description: Research Data Orchestration manager at Novo Nordisk — driving FAIR data, open science, and high-performance computing.

item.title: Making Life Science Data FAIR: 🌱 Enhancing Data Accessibility and Discoverability in Life Sciences 🔍
item.description: In the era of big data, life science research generates vast amounts of valuable data. However, much of this data remains inaccessible, hindering scientific…

item.title: SciChat: get your experiment data visualised in chatgroup

item.title: Powering the Future of Science: Unleashing the Power of Neutrons
item.description: The European Spallation Source (ESS) is a state-of-the-art research facility 🔬 that generates intense neutron beams 🌟 to probe the fundamental properties of…

item.title: Making neutron data accessible to scientists

item.title: 🚀 Fueling Space Science with ASDC
item.description: I was part of the team that built the ASDC , a cutting-edge platform that revolutionizes atmospheric and space science research. This platform serves as a…

item.title: Unveiling the Galactic Dust Veil: A C++ Exploration
item.description: Have you ever wondered about the mysterious dust that obscures our view of the cosmos? In this project, I delved into the heart of the Milky Way to map the…

item.title: Visualizing the Unseen: Unlocking the Power of Simulation Data
item.description: Ever wondered how to bring complex simulation data to life? This project is your key to unlocking the hidden beauty and insights within scientific simulations.…

item.title: Reconnecting Current Sheets in MHD Simulations: A Deep Dive

item.title: Jets: MHD Simulations of Rotating Accretion Disks Launching Jets

item.title: Chasing Supernovae: Simulating Explosions in Code 🚀
item.description: Ever wondered what happens when a massive star explodes? Buckle up, because I've been building a virtual universe to simulate just that – supernovae and…
